source_jobs.title: Support Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Founding Support Engineer (Customer Experience Engineering)
 Location: Hybrid- Bangalore

Team: Customer Experience

At Kognitos, we’re rewriting how enterprises interact with software—using plain English and the power of Generative AI. Our automation platform is transforming how work gets done, and our customers are at the heart of this revolution.

We’re looking for a Founding Support Engineer who’s not just a troubleshooter, but a customer advocate, technical guide, and product collaborator. You’ll be the face of Kognitos for our customers—solving problems, identifying patterns, building scalable solutions, and shaping the future of how support works in an AI-native world.

What You'll Own:

Be the First Line of Impact:

 - Diagnose and resolve complex technical issues related to automation flows, GenAI prompts, integrations, and performance.

 - Help customers build and troubleshoot automation scripts using natural language, code, or a blend of both.

Build Customer Relationships that Stick:

 - Engage customers through email, video, and ticketing systems. Provide timely updates, empathetic support, and thoughtful solutions.

 - Be a proactive technical advisor for strategic customers—reviewing automation code and helping optimize their workflows.

Level-Up the Product Experience:

 - Collaborate with Engineering to escalate bugs, improve product usability, and reduce recurring support issues.

 - Drive key KPIs like case deflection, time to resolution, and CSAT by improving serviceability and documentation.

Make Support Smarter and Scalable:

 - Create self-service content and training material to power GenAI-driven support experiences.

 - Reduce inbound volume through smarter tooling, knowledge bases, and intelligent monitoring.

Be a Founding Voice in Support:

 - Help define what world-class technical support looks like at Kognitos.

 - Mentor peers, share best practices, and raise the bar for customer experience.

What You Bring

 - 5+ years in a technical role (support, QA, development) within a high-growth or enterprise SaaS environment

 - Strong grasp of automation, integration workflows, and modern cloud infrastructure (AWS, Azure)

 - Experience with GenAI concepts, prompt engineering, and reducing hallucinations

 - Solid debugging skills, with familiarity in tools like Datadog, Intercom, Jam.dev http://Jam.dev, or equivalent

 - Comfort writing or reading scripts in Python, Bash, or similar languages

 - Clear, confident communicator—especially when breaking down complex issues for non-technical users

 - BS in Computer Science or related field (or equivalent practical experience)

Work Logistics

 - This is a shift-based role supporting our global customers, including occasional weekend or holiday standby

 - Expect one weekend shift a month, with flexibility based on team rotation and business needs

Why Join as a Founding Support Engineer?
You won’t just solve tickets—you’ll help build the engine that powers AI-first enterprise automation. You’ll work cross-functionally, deeply influence product decisions, and be part of a founding team defining how humans and machines collaborate.



FINAL NOTE

You do not need to match all of the listed expectations to apply for this position. We are committed to building a team with a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.




EQUAL OPPORTUNITIES PROVIDER

Kognitos is committed to fostering a diverse work environment and proud to be an equal opportunity employer. As we highly value diversity in our current and future employees, we do not discriminate (including in our hiring and promotion practices) on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status or any other characteristic protected by law.

source_jobs.title: Sales Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Sales Engineer

Location: Remote

Department: Sales / Solutions

About Kognitos:
Kognitos automates business operations using a hallucination-free neurosymbolic AI platform. Our solutions turn tribal and system knowledge into AI-refined automations using English as code, driving productivity and better decision-making. Our team includes top talent from Google, Microsoft, Meta, Amazon, and leading tech startups.

Role Overview:
As a Sales Engineer at Kognitos, you will act as the technical expert in the sales process, partnering with our sales team to demonstrate the value of our AI automation platform to prospects and clients. You’ll leverage your technical knowledge, and automation technologies, to design and present tailored solutions that address complex business challenges and drive revenue.

Key Responsibilities:

 - Partner with sales to understand client requirements and design technical solutions.

 - Deliver compelling product demonstrations, presentations, and proof-of-value to prospective clients.

 - Client Focus - Translate complex technical concepts into business value for both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

 - Collaborate with internal teams, including Customer Success, Product and Engineering, to tailor solutions for client needs.

 - Respond to technical RFPs, RFIs, and proposals as needed.

 - Conduct discovery sessions to assess client workflows, automation opportunities, and integration requirements.

 - Serve as a subject matter expert on Kognitos’ platform capabilities, integrations, and AI-driven automation solutions.

 - Provide feedback to Product and Engineering on customer requirements and potential product improvements.

 - Support post-sales handoff to ensure smooth implementation and customer success.

 - Recruit, Enable and Support Kognitos Channel Partners

Requirements:

 - Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or related field (preferred).

 - Previous experience as a Sales Engineer, Solutions Consultant, or in a pre-sales technical role, ideally in AI automation, SaaS, or enterprise software.

 - Strong technical background, with proficiency in Python and experience with APIs or automation platforms (Blue Prism, Mulesoft, Databricks, Snowflake, etc.).

 - Excellent communication and presentation skills; able to engage with both technical and business stakeholders.

 - Strong problem-solving skills and ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions.

 - Experience managing multiple opportunities in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.

 - Startup experience is a plus, demonstrating adaptability and the ability to thrive in dynamic environments.

Why Join Kognitos:

 - Be a key part of driving adoption of cutting-edge AI automation technology.

 - Work closely with top-tier engineers and innovators in a collaborative environment.

 - Opportunity to have direct impact on sales growth and customer success.

 - Dynamic startup culture with opportunities for professional growth and ownership.



FINAL NOTE

You do not need to match all of the listed expectations to apply for this position. We are committed to building a team with a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.




EQUAL OPPORTUNITIES PROVIDER

Kognitos is committed to fostering a diverse work environment and proud to be an equal opportunity employer. As we highly value diversity in our current and future employees, we do not discriminate (including in our hiring and promotion practices) on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status or any other characteristic protected by law.

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer Intern (AI-Native) — Summer 2026
source_jobs.description:
Software Engineer Intern (AI-Native) — Summer 2026

We’re looking for engineers who don’t just use AI tools — you build with them.

At Kognitos, you’ll work on real product problems using tools like Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI-assisted workflows. You’ll ship fast, learn faster, and operate in a highly iterative environment alongside experienced engineers.

This is not a “watch and learn” internship — you’ll be writing production code, contributing to core systems, and helping shape how we build.

What You’ll Do

 - Build and ship features end-to-end with the engineering team

 - Use AI-native tooling (Claude, Cursor, etc.) to accelerate development workflows

 - Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

 - Participate in code reviews and technical discussions

 - Debug issues and improve system performance

 - Contribute to projects across AI, automation, and data systems

 - Move quickly, test ideas, and iterate in a fast-paced environment

What We’re Looking For

 - Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science or a related field (or equivalent experience)

 - Strong fundamentals in programming (Python, JavaScript, or similar)

 - Comfortable building with modern dev tools and workflows

 - Familiar with Git and collaborative development

 - Solid understanding of core CS concepts (data structures, algorithms, systems basics)

 - Strong problem-solving ability and curiosity

 - Clear communicator and team-oriented

Bonus Points

 - Experience using AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, etc.)

 - Built projects using LLMs, APIs, or automation workflows

 - Familiarity with modern web stacks (React, Node, etc.)

 - Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)

 - Prior internship, startup, or side project experience



FINAL NOTE

You do not need to match all of the listed expectations to apply for this position. We are committed to building a team with a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.




EQUAL OPPORTUNITIES PROVIDER

Kognitos is committed to fostering a diverse work environment and proud to be an equal opportunity employer. As we highly value diversity in our current and future employees, we do not discriminate (including in our hiring and promotion practices) on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status or any other characteristic protected by law.

source_jobs.title: Applied ML Engineer
source_jobs.description:
If you’re passionate about tackling some of the hardest problems in AI and contributing to transformational change in enterprise automation, join us at Kognitos to build the future of software.




WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON:

 - Efficient Fine-Tuning: Develop innovative methods to optimize resource usage for training and fine-tuning models, ensuring high performance while maintaining efficiency.

 - Agentic Workflows: Advance workflows that allow AI to reason, plan, and execute tasks with reliability and determinism, minimizing errors and runtime surprises.

 - Multimodal Language Models: Work on multimodal use cases, combining text, images, and other data formats, to build adaptive, enterprise-ready automation tools.

 - Scalable AI for Enterprises: Address the needs of enterprises by creating AI solutions that can remove 30% of operational expenses through large-scale adoption.






RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Design, implement, and deploy machine learning models focused on agentic workflows and deterministic task execution.

 - Optimize AI systems for multimodal applications, addressing real-world enterprise challenges.

 - Innovate on fine-tuning techniques to maximize resource efficiency and improve model performance.

 - Ensure AI systems are aligned to regulatory policies and deliver consistent business value.

 - Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including product, engineering, and business stakeholders, to deliver impactful solutions.

 - Stay at the cutting edge of AI research, incorporating new advancements into Kognitos’ platform.






REQUIREMENTS:

 - Bachelor’s, Master’s, or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Machine Learning, or a related field.

 - Proven experience in developing and deploying machine learning models in production environments.

 - Expertise in fine-tuning techniques for large-scale models and optimizing resource usage.

 - Strong intuition working with LLMs

 - Familiarity with multimodal language models and their enterprise applications.

 - Proficiency in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar frameworks.

 - Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic




PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS:

 - Experience with agentic workflows and multi-agent systems.

 - Knowledge of enterprise automation challenges and opportunities.

 - Prior work in AI for non-consumer use cases, especially in large-scale enterprise environments.

 - Familiarity with cloud platforms and distributed computing frameworks.




WHY JOIN KOGNITOS?

 - Be part of a cutting-edge company solving some of AI’s hardest problems.

 - Work on impactful projects in a trillion-dollar hyper-automation market.

 - Collaborate with a world-class team of engineers and researchers.

 - Contribute to transformational changes in how enterprises operate.



FINAL NOTE

You do not need to match all of the listed expectations to apply for this position. We are committed to building a team with a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.




EQUAL OPPORTUNITIES PROVIDER

Kognitos is committed to fostering a diverse work environment and proud to be an equal opportunity employer. As we highly value diversity in our current and future employees, we do not discriminate (including in our hiring and promotion practices) on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status or any other characteristic protected by law.

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Enterprise Account Executive – Remote (United States)




ABOUT KOGNITOS

Kognitos is pioneering a new era of enterprise automation — where business users automate in plain English, not code. We are building a generational company in AI-powered automation and are expanding our U.S. enterprise sales team.


THE ROLE

We are hiring a high-performing Enterprise Account Executive to drive net-new growth across the United States.

This role is designed for someone who has successfully sold into complex, operationally intensive industries, including:

 - Manufacturing

 - Energy

 - Logistics & Supply Chain

 - Healthcare

 - Financial Services

You understand how these industries operate, where automation creates measurable ROI, and how to navigate complex enterprise buying processes.

This is a true hunter role for someone with a founder’s mindset — building pipeline from scratch, closing complex enterprise deals, and helping refine go-to-market strategy in a fast-moving startup environment.


WHAT YOU’LL DO


TERRITORY & MARKET DEVELOPMENT

 - Own and execute a strategic plan to identify, engage, and close enterprise accounts across the U.S.

 - Prioritize accounts within manufacturing, energy, logistics, healthcare, and financial services

 - Build and manage a strong pipeline through outbound prospecting, industry networking, executive outreach, and partnerships


ENTERPRISE ENGAGEMENT

 - Lead consultative discovery conversations with CIOs, COOs, Heads of Operations, Automation, and Digital Transformation

 - Leverage your understanding of industry-specific workflows, compliance requirements, and operational challenges

 - Develop multi-threaded relationships across large enterprises and expand influence across business units


SALES EXECUTION

 - Manage complex, multi-stakeholder sales cycles including technical validation, proof of value, procurement, and executive approvals

 - Deliver tailored demonstrations and business cases aligned to operational and financial impact

 - Partner closely with Solutions, Product, and Customer Success for seamless execution and long-term growth


REVENUE OWNERSHIP

 - Own and exceed quota

 - Maintain disciplined pipeline management and accurate forecasting

 - Ensure strong CRM hygiene and visibility into deal progression


REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

 - 5+ years of enterprise B2B sales experience (SaaS, automation, AI, or enterprise platforms)

 - Demonstrated success selling into manufacturing, energy, logistics, healthcare, or financial services

 - Proven ability to navigate complex buying committees and regulated environments

 - Track record of building pipeline independently and closing net-new enterprise logos

 - Strong executive presence and consultative selling skills

 - Experience managing long, strategic sales cycles


PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

 - Background in automation, RPA, AI, or digital transformation technologies

 - Experience selling into highly regulated or operationally intensive industries

 - Prior startup experience in a high-growth environment


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive base salary + uncapped commission

 - Meaningful equity in a high-growth, venture-backed company

 - Comprehensive health, dental, and vision benefits

 - Remote-first culture with regular team offsites

 - The opportunity to help define a category in enterprise automation

If you’ve built and closed enterprise relationships within manufacturing, energy, logistics, healthcare, or financial services — and want to lead growth in a company redefining automation — we’d love to



FINAL NOTE

You do not need to match all of the listed expectations to apply for this position. We are committed to building a team with a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive — Financial Services AI
source_jobs.description:
ENTERPRISE ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE — FINANCIAL SERVICES AI


KOGNITOS https://www.kognitos.com?utm_source=chatgpt.com

Kognitos is redefining how enterprises automate work using AI.

Instead of brittle workflows and traditional RPA, Kognitos enables businesses to automate operations using natural language and AI-powered reasoning. We help enterprises deploy intelligent automation that scales across finance, operations, compliance, and back-office workflows.

We’re looking for an experienced enterprise seller who understands both AI and the financial services landscape. This role is ideal for someone excited about helping banks, fintechs, insurers, and finance teams adopt next-generation AI automation.

This is an opportunity to join an early, fast-growing company and play a foundational role in building the GTM motion for AI within financial services.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own the full enterprise sales cycle from outbound prospecting through close

 - Build relationships with executives across finance, operations, technology, and transformation teams

 - Educate prospects on how Kognitos uses AI and natural language automation to modernize enterprise workflows

 - Identify high-value automation opportunities within financial organizations

 - Navigate technical, compliance, and security conversations with enterprise stakeholders

 - Partner closely with solutions engineering and product teams during evaluations and pilots

 - Develop pipeline through strategic outbound, networking, partnerships, and industry events

 - Provide feedback on messaging, positioning, and product-market fit within financial services


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 5+ years of enterprise SaaS sales experience

 - Experience selling into financial services organizations including banking, fintech, insurance, or investment firms

 - Background selling AI, automation, workflow, infrastructure, data, or enterprise platform solutions

 - Proven track record closing complex enterprise deals

 - Strong consultative and executive communication skills

 - Ability to translate technical capabilities into measurable business outcomes

 - Comfortable operating in a fast-paced startup environment


NICE TO HAVE

 - Existing relationships within financial services organizations

 - Experience selling AI copilots, automation platforms, RPA, or workflow transformation tools

 - Familiarity with enterprise AI adoption challenges including governance, compliance, and security

 - Prior startup or founding sales experience

 - Technical fluency around APIs, LLMs, or enterprise systems


WHY KOGNITOS

 - Work at the forefront of enterprise AI adoption

 - Help define how financial organizations operationalize AI

 - Join a high-growth team shaping the future of intelligent automation

 - Competitive compensation + equity

 - Opportunity to make an outsized impact early



FINAL NOTE

You do not need to match all of the listed expectations to apply for this position. We are committed to building a team with a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.




EQUAL OPPORTUNITIES PROVIDER

Kognitos is committed to fostering a diverse work environment and proud to be an equal opportunity employer. As we highly value diversity in our current and future employees, we do not discriminate (including in our hiring and promotion practices) on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status or any other characteristic protected by law.

source_jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Job Details

Join Our Team as a Backend Engineer and Shape the Future of Technology!

Are you ready to take on an exciting challenge in developing and maintaining cutting-edge backend infrastructure? At Kognitos, we're seeking passionate engineers like you to join our team and make a meaningful impact.

As a Backend Engineer, you'll play a crucial role in:

 - Developing and maintaining our backend infrastructure using Python and AWS Serverless technologies.

 - Collaborating with cross-functional teams to design and implement scalable and robust systems, including microservices and cloud-based architectures.

 - Ensuring the reliability, scalability, and performance of our backend systems through monitoring and optimization.

 - Creating and maintaining database schema and queries to support application features.

 - Writing unit and integration tests to ensure code quality and reliability.

 - Continuously improving our software development process by incorporating best practices and modern methodologies such as Agile, DevOps, and CI/CD.

 - Investigating and troubleshooting production issues to minimize downtime and ensure smooth operations.

 - Participating in architectural discussions and contributing to the development of technical solutions and best practices.

 - Staying up-to-date with the latest technologies and trends in software development to recommend improvements to our technology stack.

What We're Looking For:

 - A B.S. or higher degree in Computer Science/Engineering or equivalent work experience, with 4-8 years of industry experience.

 - Proficiency in the Python programming language.

 - Experience with modern software development practices and methodologies, including Agile, DevOps, and CI/CD.

 - Experience with large-scale distributed systems, microservices, and cloud-based architectures.

 - A strong understanding of software design patterns, algorithms, data structures, and database technologies.

 - A natural problem solver with the ability to identify problems and lead the development of solutions.

What We Offer:

 - A competitive salary and benefits package.

 - Flexible working hours to support work-life balance.

 - A dynamic and collaborative work environment where your ideas are valued.

 - Opportunities for professional development and growth.

 - An innovative culture that encourages creative thinking and problem-solving.

Join us at Kognitos and be part of a team that's shaping the future of technology. Apply now and let's build something incredible together!



FINAL NOTE

You do not need to match all of the listed expectations to apply for this position. We are committed to building a team with a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills.




EQUAL OPPORTUNITIES PROVIDER

Kognitos is committed to fostering a diverse work environment and proud to be an equal opportunity employer. As we highly value diversity in our current and future employees, we do not discriminate (including in our hiring and promotion practices) on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status or any other characteristic protected by law.
